description: Standard prompts for coffee cup background resolution benchmark

prompts.prompt: Professional office photography. A person typing on a laptop in focus. In the background on a desk, there is a white ceramic coffee mug, partially visible behind a stack of books. Warm lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic.

Modern coworking space. Two people in conversation at a table, foreground sharp. Behind them on a side table, a small espresso cup on a saucer sits next to a plant. Natural window light, bokeh background.
Busy open-plan office. Multiple desks visible in deep focus. Three different coffee mugs scattered across background desks at varying distances. Fluorescent overhead lighting, documentary style.
Cafe scene. Close-up of hands holding a phone in the foreground. On the table behind, a latte in a ceramic cup with latte art visible. Warm ambient light, shallow depth of field.
Coffee shop interior. Barista making coffee in the foreground. On a distant counter, two takeaway cups and one ceramic mug arranged casually. Moody lighting, cinematic composition.
Crowded cafe with multiple tables visible at different depths. At least four coffee cups visible across the scene, ranging from foreground to far background. Busy, realistic street cafe atmosphere.
Home office setup. Person working at a desk, face visible. On a bookshelf behind them, a single coffee mug sits between books. Soft daylight from a window, portrait style.
Living room scene. Person reading a book on a couch in focus. On the coffee table in mid-ground, a half-full mug of coffee next to magazines. Cozy evening lighting.

Kitchen scene with deep depth of field. Person cooking at a stove in the foreground. On the counter behind them, a travel mug, a ceramic cup, and a glass of water. Multiple reflective surfaces, complex lighting.
Park bench scene. Person sitting and writing in a notebook, sharp focus. On the bench armrest behind them, a to-go coffee cup with a cardboard sleeve. Dappled sunlight through trees.
Outdoor market or food court. Multiple people at tables. Several coffee cups of different styles visible at various distances throughout the scene. Bright daylight, complex scene with many objects.
Product photography studio. Camera on tripod in foreground. On a side table in the background, a single porcelain coffee cup sits on a saucer. Clean, minimal studio lighting.
